refnamediv.refpurpose: Register images with rotation, scale, and translation correction.

listitem.para: Source grayscale or color image to align. Its dimensions may differ from the target.
Source image warped into the target coordinate system and target dimensions.
Two-element affine translation vector [tx ty], in pixels.
Estimated rotation applied to the source, in degrees.
Estimated scale factor applied to the source image content.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Estimates a similarity registration and returns the source image aligned to the target. For feature-rich images, OpenCV SIFT matching and RANSAC estimate rotation, content scale, and translation in one transform. This avoids treating empty canvas borders as image content. OpenCV phase correlation and ECC registration provide a fallback when there are not enough reliable feature matches.

refsection.title: Examples

tr.td: OpenCV feature-based similarity registration added with phase/ECC fallback.
